safe_reload: <green>Waiting until all games are stopped or 60 seconds before reloading the plugin.
safe_reload_failed_to_stop_game: <red>Some games were not stopped in time, the arena may have been damaged!

admin.cannot_create: <red>Sign couldn't be created! Please check the name of the arena!
admin.cannot_destroy: <red>Sinulla ei ole oikeutta hajottaa tätä kylttiä
admin.unknown_game: <red>The game that is written on the sign doesnt exist! Please contact an admin!

errors.game_already_running: <red>Peli <gray><arena> <red>on käynnissä! Et voi liittyä käynnissä olevaan peliin
errors.vip_game_is_full: <red>Peli <gray><arena> <red>on täynnä VIP pelaajia. Odota pelin päättymistä
errors.game_is_gone: <red>Peli, jossa olit, ei ole enää olemassa
errors.there_is_no_empty_game: <red>Yhtään peliä ei ole odotustilassa. Kaikki pelit ovat käynnissä

destroyed.killable: Voit nyt tappaa kaikkia tiimin <team> jäseniä!
destroyed.subtitle: Voit nyt tappaa tiimikavereita!

end.game_ended_too_early: <red>Peli päättyy liian aikaisin. Kukaan ei voita

cheat.please_provide_valid_cheat_type: <red>Provided cheat type is not valid or is missing!
cheat.invalid_player: <red>Specified player is not in any game or is a spectator!
cheat.game_not_running: <red>You can only cheat when game is running!
cheat.game_not_waiting: <red>You can execute this cheat only when game is in the waiting state!
cheat.game_forced: <green>Game is now going to start with one empty team, so at least two teams are in the game for plugin to work correctly. Invalidate its target to win! <gray>It is not protected so it should be easy for you, right?
cheat.team_is_not_in_game: <red>Team <gray><team></gray> is currently not in the game, and therefore this cheat cannot be executed!
cheat.unknown_target: <red>The command does not know how to invalidate the target of the team <gray><team></gray>!
cheat.target_is_not_valid: <red>The target of the team <gray><team></gray> could not be invalidated because it is already invalid!
cheat.received_target_invalidated: <green>The target of the team <gray><team></gray> has been invalidated! <gray>Players in that team no longer likes you :(
cheat.received_targets_invalidated: <green>All possible targets of all teams in the game have been invalidated! <gray>That would make the game a bit faster.
cheat.team_random_failed: <red>An algorithm failed to choose you a random team. <gray>That's weird.

game_start: <yellow><bold>Suojaa oma punkkasi ja tuhoa vihollisten punkat</bold>
<yellow><bold>Upgrade yourself and your team by collecting</bold>

record.no: <aqua>This is the first time this game is played. What about setting a new record?

help.title: Screaming BedWars <version> - Help

messages.page_out_of_range: Virhe: Sivua <page> ei löydy. Sivun on oltava väliltä [1, <max_pages>]

help.bw_leaderboard: /bw leaderboard - <green>Show top players of this server
help.bw_addholo: /bw addholo [leaderboard|stats]- <yellow>Adds hologram to the player's location
help.bw_removeholo: /bw removeholo - <yellow>After executing this command, the player can right-click the holographic statistic to remove it.
help.bw_mainlobby: /bw mainlobby [enable|set] - <yellow>Enables main lobby or sets main lobby location
help.bw_admin_info: /bw admin \<arena> info [section] - <yellow>Shows you all information about arena
help.bw_admin_lobby: /bw admin \<arena> lobby - <yellow>Sets lobby position to your position
help.bw_admin_spec: /bw admin \<arena> spec - <yellow>Sets specatator's spawn to your position
help.bw_admin_pos1: /bw admin \<arena> pos1 - <yellow>Sets the extreme point of the arena to your position
help.bw_admin_pos2: /bw admin \<arena> pos2 - <yellow>Sets the second extreme point of the arena to your position
help.bw_admin_lobby_pos1: /bw admin \<arena> lobbypos1 - <yellow>Sets the extreme point of the lobby to your position
help.bw_admin_lobby_pos2: /bw admin \<arena> lobbypos2 - <yellow>Sets the second extreme point of the lobby to your position
help.bw_admin_pausecountdown: /bw admin \<arena> pausecountdown \<seconds> - <yellow>Sets the pause duration before game starts
help.bw_admin_minplayers: /bw admin \<arena> minplayers \<minimum> - <yellow>Sets minimum of players needed to start the game
help.bw_admin_team_add: /bw admin \<arena>team add \<team> \<color> \<max players> - <yellow>Add a team to the game
help.bw_admin_team_maxplayers: /bw admin \<arena> team maxplayers \<team> \<max players> - <yellow>Change max team players
help.bw_admin_team_spawn: /bw admin \<arena> team spawn \<team> - <yellow>Sets team spawn to your position
help.bw_admin_team_bed: /bw admin \<arena> team bed \<team> - <yellow>Sets team target block to your target position (it can be another block, not just bed)
help.bw_admin_jointeam: /bw admin \<arena> jointeam \<team> - <yellow>Sets the ability to connect to a team using an entity
help.bw_admin_spawner_add: /bw admin \<arena> spawner add \<bronze|gold|iron> [hologram] [first level] [name] [team] [max spawned resources] - <yellow>Add item spawner to your position
help.bw_admin_spawner_max_spawned_resources: /bw admin \<arena> spawner maxSpawnedResources \<value> - <yellow>Sets max spawned resources limit of the spawner at your position
help.bw_admin_spawner_rotation_mode: /bw admin \<arena> spawner rotationMode \<mode> - <yellow>Sets the floating hologram's rotation mode of the spawner at your position
help.bw_admin_spawner_change_type: /bw admin \<arena> spawner changeType \<type> - <yellow>Changes the type of the spawner at your position
help.bw_admin_spawner_custom_name: /bw admin \<arena> spawner customName \<name> - <yellow>Sets the custom name of the spawner at your position
help.bw_admin_spawner_hologram_type: /bw admin \<arena> spawner hologramType \<type> - <yellow>Sets the type of the spawner's hologram at your position
help.bw_admin_spawner_linked_team: /bw admin \<arena> spawner linkedTeam \<team|null> - <yellow>Links the spawner at your position with the specified team
help.bw_admin_spawner_base_amount: /bw admin \<arena> spawner baseAmount \<amount> - <yellow>Sets the base amount of resources that the spawner should spawn per cycle
help.bw_admin_spawner_hologram: /bw admin \<arena> spawner hologram \<true|false> - <yellow>Enables/Disables hologram above the spawner
help.bw_admin_spawner_floating: /bw admin \<arena> spawner floating \<true|false> - <yellow>Enables/Disables floating block under the spawner's hologram
help.bw_admin_store_add: /bw admin \<arena> store add [name above dealer head] [file with shop] [use main shop] - <yellow>Add trading villager to your position
help.bw_admin_store_remove: /bw admin \<arena> store remove - <yellow>Remove trading villager from your position
help.bw_admin_store_type: /bw admin \<arena> store type \<living entity> - <yellow>Sets entity type of store (Villager, Horse, Cow, Pig etc.)
help.bw_admin_config_set: /bw admin \<arena> config set \<data type> \<constant> \<value> - <yellow>Sets value of a constant for a game
help.bw_admin_config_reset: /bw admin \<arena> config reset \<constant> - <yellow>Resets a constant to the inherited value
help.bw_admin_config_list_add: /bw admin \<arena> config list \<data type> \<constant> add \<value> - <yellow>Adds new value to the list of constants
help.bw_admin_config_list_set: /bw admin \<arena> config list \<data type> \<constant> set \<position> \<value> - <yellow>Changes value at the position to the list of constants
help.bw_admin_config_list_remove: /bw admin \<arena> config list \<data type> \<constant> remove \<position> - <yellow>Removes value from the position in the list of constants
help.bw_admin_config_list_clear: /bw admin \<arena> config list \<data type> \<constant> clear - <yellow>Clears the list of constants without setting it to inherit
help.bw_admin_fee: /bw admin \<arena> fee \<fee> - <yellow>Sets the economy fee needed to enter the arena.
help.bw_admin_arena_time: /bw admin \<arena> arenatime \<type> - <yellow>Sets time in arena (DAY, NIGHT, etc.)
help.bw_admin_arena_weather: /bw admin \<arena> arenaweather \<type> - <yellow>Sets weather in arena (default, CLEAN, DOWNFALL)
help.bw_admin_post_game_waiting: /bw admin \<arena> postgamewaiting \<seconds> - <yellow>Sets the waiting time before player is teleported out of the arena
help.bw_admin_customprefix: /bw admin \<arena> customprefix \<name|off> - <yellow>Enables custom prefix for arena
help.bw_admin_display_name: /bw admin \<arena> displayName \<name|off> - <yellow>Sets display name of the arena
help.bw_admin_edit: /bw admin \<arena> edit - <yellow>Turns the game off and switches the arena to edit mode
help.bw_admin_save: /bw admin \<arena> save - <green>Saves the game and activates it!
help.bw_alljoin: /bw alljoin [arena] - <green>Joins all players on the server to bedwars game
help.bw_admin_spawner_remove: /bw admin \<arena> spawner remove - <yellow>Removes all spawners at location
help.bw_admin_store_child: /bw admin \<arena> store child - <yellow>Mark this shopkeeper as child
help.bw_admin_store_adult: /bw admin \<arena> store adult - <yellow>Mark this shopkeeper as adult
help.bw_migrate: /bw migrate \<plugin> - <yellow>Migrates the configuration from a different BedWars plugin.
help.bw_dump: /bw dump - <yellow>Dumps the server and gives you link to the dump. This link can be useful for support
help.bw_admin_interactive: /bw admin \<arena> interactive - <yellow>If arena is in edit mode, this command will enable interactive mode
help.bw_cheat_give: /bw cheat give \<resource> [amount] [player] - <red>Gives player specified amount of resource

new_release: <green>New RELEASE version <version> of BedWars is available!
patch_release: <yellow>New patch release for BedWars <version> is here!

error.arena_not_in_edit: <red>Arena doesn't exist or is running! Deactivate it with <gray>/bw admin \<arena> edit<red> and then activate it with <gray>/bw admin \<arena> save

errors.must_be_in_same_world: <red>All commands must be executed in the same world!
errors.must_be_in_bounds: <red>Location must be placed inside the arena (pos1 and pos2 coordinates)!
errors.set_bounds_first: <red>Before setting spawn, please set the pos1 and pos2 coordinates (Determining the size and position of the arena)!
errors.invalid_bounds: <red>The height difference between pos1 and pos2 is too small! The minimum is 5 blocks!
errors.invalid_spawner_type: <red>Spawner must be bronze, iron, gold, or by custom configuration!
errors.invalid_spawner_level: <white>Wrong level number, default level 1 was used.
errors.spawners_needed: <red>The game must have at least one item spawner!
errors.cannot_rename_team: <red>Cannot rename team <gray><team><red> to <gray><new-team><red>! This name is already taken!
errors.set_bounds_before_save: <red>Before saving the game please set the pos1 and pos2 coordinates (Determining the size and position of the arena)!
errors.set_lobby_before_save: <red>Before saving the game please set lobby spawn!
errors.set_spec_before_save: <red>Before saving the game please set spec spawn!
errors.set_stores_before_save: <red>Before saving the game please add at least 1 store!
errors.set_spawners_before_save: <red>Before saving the game please add at least 1 spawner!
errors.set_target_block_for_team_before_save: <red>Before saving the game please set target block of team <gray><team><red>!
errors.set_spawn_for_team_before_save: <red>Before saving the game please set spawn of team <gray><team><red>!
errors.missing_spawners: <yellow>There are no spawners in the game.
errors.missing_stores: <yellow>There are no stores in the game.
errors.weird_store_count: <yellow>There number of stores in this game is <gray><count><yellow> which is not a multiplier of the team count. Is this correct?
errors.skip_warnings: <yellow>If you want to save <gray><game><yellow> anyways, please execute this command: <gray><command>
errors.invalid_constant_enum_value: <red>Invalid value <gray><value></gray>! Must be one of these: <gray><values>
errors.npc_must_have_skin_name: <red>If you use entity type PLAYER, you must specify skin name in format <gray>PLAYER:[skin's owner]

multiple_spawners.first_line: <red>There are more spawners in the same place, please choose a specific one:

errors.team_spawn_set_blocked: <red>The team <gray><team><red> has more than one spawnpoint, so using set command is not allowed.
errors.team_spawn_on_the_same_block: <red>There is already a spawnpoint at this position. If you want to change the rotation, remove it first.
errors.team_no_spawn_there: <red>There is no spawnpoint at this position.
errors.nothing_in_hand: <red>You are not holding any item in your hand!
errors.overlapping_arenas: <red>The chosen location causes the arena to overlap with another arena, which can lead to errors! Please choose a different location. If you insist on using this location, execute <gray><command>
errors.invalid_prefab: <red>No prefab called <gray><name><red> is configured in variant <gray><variant><red>!

success.target_none_set: <green>Team <gray><team><green> will now play without any target. That means they will not be able to respawn!
